assumptions: The question concerns the classification and subsequent measurement of a financial asset under IFRS 9.

approaches.label: Amortised cost
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context links the SPPI condition in paragraphs 4.1.2(b) and B4.1.10-B4.1.12 to eligibility for subsequent measurement at amortised cost.

approaches.label: Fair value through other comprehensive income
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The same SPPI condition is also linked in the context to eligibility for subsequent measurement at fair value through other comprehensive income under paragraphs 4.1.2A(b), B4.1.10 and B4.1.12.

approaches.label: Fair value through profit or loss
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context indicates that instruments failing the SPPI-linked conditions cannot be measured at amortised cost or FVOCI, and identifies fair value through profit or loss as the alternative measurement basis.
